title: synnema griffithii
intro: Synnema griffithii is a plant species, also known as Indian snakeroot, which belongs to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, Synnema griffithii has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and calming the nervous system. Synnema griffithii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and powder for medicinal use.
